title: China-to-Vanuatu Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
provenance: AI-compiled, multi-model cross-checked, not human-verified. Informational only; confirm with the official regulator and a qualified professional. Not legal/certification/customs/market-access advice.

rows.requirement: EMC - IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-Series Evidence for Vanuatu PV Inverter Projects
rows.target_requirement: Vanuatu's national standards capacity for PV-inverter-specific rules is limited, so EMC expectations for grid-connected PV projects are normally set by utility review, project-owner specifications, French / IEC legacy practice, and lender or EPC requirements. For PV inverters, the relevant EMC package should include IEC 62920 for PV power conversion equipment and applicable IEC 61000-series emissions / immunity evidence, including harmonic current emissions where relevant. The EMC file should cover the exact inverter model, power rating, firmware configuration, and installation environment being supplied to Vanuatu, including tropical humidity, coastal salt-mist exposure, cyclone-season surge exposure, grounding / earthing configuration, and heat derating assumptions for island grids.
target_standards: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility emissions, immunity, harmonics, flicker, and related test methods
Vanuatu Bureau of Standards and Industry (VBSI) standards context
UNELCO / VUI utility and project technical review context
rows.china_equivalent: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence is commonly prepared under GB/T 37408-2021 and related domestic test methods at CNAS-accredited laboratories. Although Chinese standards may reference IEC 61000-family methods, GB/T 37408-2021 EMC files are not automatically equivalent to an IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 project package for Vanuatu. They also may not document operation under Vanuatu's 230/400 V grid, coastal surge exposure, salt-mist environment, cyclone-season installation constraints, or project-specific cable and earthing configuration.
china_standards: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CNAS-accredited domestic EMC test reports for China market PV inverters
rows.gap: Gap: China domestic EMC evidence should be supplemented with IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000-series reports for Vanuatu project review. Exporters should confirm whether the buyer, UNELCO, VUI, URA-facing project engineer, lender, or EPC requires ILAC-accredited IEC reports, and whether harmonics or immunity results need to be rechecked at 230/400 V, 50 Hz. For coastal and cyclone-exposed projects, EMC and surge-protection documentation should be paired with installation evidence for earthing, lightning protection, enclosure integrity, cable routing, spare surge-protection devices, and salt-mist corrosion resistance.

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but commonly required in practice for UNELCO, VUI, EPC, lender, insurer, or owner technical review of grid-connected PV inverter projects
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 37408-2021 EMC evidence supports China domestic voluntary certification and procurement but does not automatically transfer to Vanuatu IEC-aligned project review

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat China GB/T 37408-2021 EMC reports as supporting evidence, not as a complete Vanuatu EMC file. Confirm IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-series report expectations with the Vanuatu buyer, UNELCO, VUI, URA-facing reviewer, EPC, or lender, and check whether the 230/400 V grid profile, cyclone-season surge exposure, and salt-mist environment require additional project evidence.

source.publisher: Vanuatu Bureau of Standards and Industry (VBSI)

rows.requirement: URA and Utility Grid-Connection Review - IEC 62116, IEC 61727, and 230/400 V 50 Hz Settings
rows.target_requirement: Vanuatu's electricity sector is regulated by the Utilities Regulatory Authority (URA), with grid operations handled through concession utilities including UNELCO in Port Vila and Vanuatu Utilities and Infrastructure (VUI) on other concession networks. Publicly confirmed PV-inverter-specific national standards are limited, so grid-tied inverter acceptance is normally driven by URA-regulated utility connection review, project-owner specifications, French / IEC legacy practice, and lender or EPC requirements. For grid-connected PV inverters, project submissions should include IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence and IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, with inverter firmware, voltage/frequency protection thresholds, reconnection delays, and commissioning settings validated for Vanuatu's 230/400 V, 50 Hz network. Vanuatu shares China's 50 Hz frequency, but its nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline.
target_standards: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
Utilities Regulatory Authority (URA) electricity-sector regulatory context
UNELCO / VUI utility grid-connection and project technical review
Vanuatu low-voltage grid basis — 230/400 V, 50 Hz
rows.china_equivalent: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power-station grid connection, NB/T 32004 for PV grid-connected inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408-2021 for grid-connected PV inverter technical requirements, and domestic anti-islanding test results. These documents are prepared for China's 50 Hz, 220/380 V grid conditions and domestic grid-operator acceptance. They are not automatically accepted by URA, UNELCO, VUI, or Vanuatu project owners as IEC 62116 / IEC 61727 evidence, and they do not prove that firmware settings have been validated for Vanuatu's 230/400 V network.
china_standards: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
rows.gap: Gap: China GB/T and NB/T grid evidence is not a substitute for Vanuatu project-level utility acceptance. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface reports for the specific inverter model, document the Vanuatu utility or project settings loaded into firmware, and validate protection thresholds at 230/400 V, 50 Hz. Because Vanuatu is a cyclone-prone Pacific SIDS market, commissioning files should also document enclosure rating, corrosion protection, surge protection, mounting, thermal derating, spare-parts strategy, and sea-freight logistics through Port Vila.

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for grid-connected projects requiring URA-regulated UNELCO, VUI, utility, EPC, lender, or owner connection review and commissioning acceptance
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence supports China domestic grid acceptance but is not transferable to Vanuatu utility or project acceptance

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not submit China-only GB/T 19964-2024, NB/T 32004, or GB/T 37408-2021 files as a complete Vanuatu grid-connection package. Prepare IEC 62116 / IEC 61727 evidence and confirm URA-regulated utility project settings for Vanuatu's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid. Vanuatu shares China's 50 Hz frequency, but the nominal voltage differs, so firmware and protection settings should be checked before commissioning.

rows.requirement: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence - VBSI, URA, UNELCO, VUI, and Project Review
rows.target_requirement: Vanuatu has limited publicly confirmed national PV-inverter product standards, so safety acceptance is normally shaped by VBSI standards context, URA-regulated utility review, UNELCO / VUI connection requirements, project-owner specifications, French / IEC legacy practice, and lender or EPC requirements. For grid-connected solar PV inverters, the practical safety baseline expected by utilities, EPCs, lenders, insurers, and project owners is IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 type-test evidence for the inverter model or model family. Vanuatu's tropical maritime and cyclone-prone environment also makes the safety file more than an electrical shock file: it should document IP rating, humidity and temperature operating limits, corrosion controls, terminal and enclosure materials, surge protection coordination, spares, and installation constraints for salt-mist coastal sites and cyclone-rated mounting.
target_standards: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
Vanuatu Bureau of Standards and Industry (VBSI) standards context
Utilities Regulatory Authority (URA) electricity-sector regulatory context
UNELCO / VUI utility and project technical review context
rows.china_equivalent: China-side PV inverter safety evidence commonly relies on GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, domestic voluntary CQC or CGC certification, and CNAS-accredited laboratory reports. These files may demonstrate China-market conformity but are not automatic substitutes for IEC 62109-1/-2 certificates requested in Vanuatu project procurement, UNELCO / VUI utility review, or URA-facing grid-connection submissions. China documentation also often assumes domestic environmental and installation conditions, and may not cover Vanuatu-specific cyclone, high-humidity, salt-mist, remote-serviceability, and elevated ambient-temperature derating risks.
china_standards: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CQC / CGC voluntary China-market PV inverter certification schemes
rows.gap: Gap: China GB/T 37408-2021 or NB/T 32004 safety evidence should be supplemented with IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test reports for the specific inverter model or family supplied to Vanuatu. Exporters should confirm whether the buyer, UNELCO, VUI, URA-facing reviewer, EPC, lender, or insurer requires ILAC-accredited reports, and should add environmental design evidence for coastal corrosion, humidity, enclosure sealing, surge withstand, ventilation, cyclone-resistant installation, and serviceability after sea freight through Port Vila. Where an inverter model is reconfigured from a China-market firmware profile to Vanuatu's 230/400 V, 50 Hz profile, the safety and operating-limit documentation should identify that configuration.

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but commonly mandatory in practice for utility, EPC, lender, insurer, or owner acceptance of Vanuatu grid-connected PV inverter projects
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary China-market PV inverter certification evidence does not automatically transfer to Vanuatu IEC 62109 project acceptance

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on China GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, or domestic voluntary certification alone for Vanuatu PV inverter safety review. Prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 evidence for the supplied model and document Vanuatu-specific environmental controls for cyclone exposure, humidity, salt mist, surge protection, sea-freight handling, remote serviceability, and thermal derating before shipment or project submission.
